name: Shad and Vincent
description:

vinny's note: y'all ready for me to drop like sixty alts? /j ofc. gotten a lot of requests so I'm clearing them up. this one in particular is from my dearest friend sera, who you can find listed in my friends list. love u shnookums <3 get he ass strawberry
